title: You Pick, I Cook
desc: You choose anything you want — I’ll cook it properly from scratch. You relax, I handle everything (yes, including cleanup).

title: Date Night
desc: Your call — we go out somewhere nice or order your favourite takeaway. Either way, it’s a proper date and I’ve got it covered.

title: Surprise Gift
desc: A mystery gift, picked just for you. No hints — just something I know you’ll love.

title: Flowers
desc: A surprise bouquet of your favourite flowers, just because. No reason needed.

title: Massage Night
desc: A proper, no-rush massage. Candles, music, full relax mode — you don’t lift a finger.

title: Your Wish Night
desc: Until midnight, I’m on call. Drinks, snacks, favours — whatever you ask (within reason), I’m doing it.

title: Zero Effort Day
desc: You do nothing today. I handle chores, food, errands — everything. You just relax.

title: Breakfast in Bed
desc: You stay in bed. I make your favourite breakfast from scratch and bring it to you.

title: Snack Run
desc: We go get whatever you’re craving — late night or random trip. No limits, just vibes.

title: Mystery Box
desc: I put together a box of things you like — snacks, cute stuff, random surprises.

title: Your Rules Night
desc: You decide everything — what we do, eat, watch, play. No complaints from me.

title: Lazy Day Pass
desc: We cancel all plans. Hoodies, snacks, no responsibilities. Full do-nothing day together.

title: Drinks On Me
desc: I’ll get you your favourite drinks — at home or out. You just enjoy, I’ll keep them coming.

title: Dessert Run
desc: We go out just for dessert — cakes, donuts, whatever you’re craving. No rules, just sugar.

title: Cook Together Night
desc: We cook something together — you lead, I assist. Might be chaos, but that’s part of it.

title: No Phone Night
desc: No phones, no distractions. Just us, music, food, and actual time together.
